title: lobelia glandulosa
intro: Lobelia glandulosa, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia glandulosa include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Lobelia glandulosa can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support respiratory health and promote relaxation.
